  • Uses of FxNodeBuilder in io.forja.builder

    Classes in io.forja.builder with type parameters of type FxNodeBuilder
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    FxNodeBuilder<T extends javafx.scene.Node,B extends FxNodeBuilder<T,B>>
    Abstract base builder for Forja component builders whose target is a Node but not a Control.
